final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty skincare brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-column hero layout (left: copy column, center: model subject, right: product display), header bar at top, and benefit cards row at bottom
Subject: must include all of the following:
  Center: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
  Left column: headline, subheadline, 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons, 3 bullet points with pink checkmarks, 2 CTA buttons, trust badge line
  Right column: 2 product items (moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle + packaging box), 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents
  Bottom: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons
Scene/backdrop: needs a soft, airy indoor or studio feel — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, diffused feminine lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be soft pink and white dominant, with purple floral accents — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a light, delicate surface treatment with floral decorative elements — exact petal style and placement are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all of the following verbatim:
  Header — logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY"
  Header — nav links (5): "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ"
  Header — CTA button: "今すぐ試す"
  Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。"
  Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。"
  Feature badges (3): "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える"
  Bullet points (3): "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア"
  CTA buttons (2): "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >"
  Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"
  Stat cards (3): "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破"
  Benefit cards (3): "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: must preserve all 3 layout columns in hero section, header navigation with 5 links, 3 stat cards as floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents, 3 benefit cards as horizontal white rounded rectangles at bottom
Avoid:
